nodeMixNote: HBM4 logic base die coupling to TSMC noted in context; filing does not disclose node-mix detail
rationale: MU 10-Q (Feb 26, 2026) shows capex (property, plant & equipment expenditures) of $11,776M for the first six months of fiscal 2026 vs. $7,261M in the same period of fiscal 2025, implying ~62% YoY increase in capital spending, consistent with aggressive HBM and advanced DRAM capacity expansion; no explicit HBM lead-time, utilization, or pricing figures are disclosed in the filing text.
